zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney於1373年5月24日出生在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯時，他的父親Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney29歲，母親Jean Haliburton15歲。他於1407年11月17日與Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年2月1日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney于1373年5月24日出生在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯时，他的父亲Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney29岁，母亲Jean Haliburton15岁。他于1407年11月17日与Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1422年2月1日在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年48岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney was born on 24 May 1373, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, his father, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, was 29 and his mother, Jean Haliburton, was 15. He married Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney on 17 November 1407, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 February 1422, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney est né le 24 mai 1373, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jean Haliburton, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney le 17 novembre 1407, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 février 1422, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney am 24. Mai 1373 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney 29 und seine Mutter Jean Haliburton 15. Er hat am 17. November 1407 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Februar 1422 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney è nato il il 24 maggio 1373 nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, il suo padre, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Jean Haliburton, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney il 17 novembre 1407, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1422, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkneyが1373年5月24日にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkneyは29歳，母Jean Haliburtonは15歳であった。1407年11月17日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでEgidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年2月1日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで48歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンロスリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney(이)가 1373년 5월 24일 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Jean Haliburton(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1407년 11월 17일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 2월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에 묻혔다.

pt.24 MAY 1373–1 February 1422: 24 de maio de 1373–1 de fevereiro de 1422
pt.Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland: Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney nasceu em 24 de maio de 1373, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jean Haliburton, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney em 17 de novembro de 1407, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1422, em Roslin, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney родился 24 мая 1373 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jean Haliburton, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney 17 ноября 1407 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 февраля 1422 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия.

Se casó con Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney el 17 de noviembre de 1407, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
